untranslatable_reason: Signal requires factor analysis of volume drivers with >80% confidence thresholds and matching strategy dependencies. This requires: (1) multi-factor decomposition of volume sources not available in standard indicators, (2) confidence scoring from factor analysis model, (3) strategy dependency matching logic that cannot be expressed with simple indicator comparisons. The allowed indicators (vol_ratio_20, hvol_20) provide only aggregate volume metrics, not driver identification or factor confidence scores. This is a regime/meta-rule that requires external factor analysis model, not a mechanical indicator-based rule.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a rule about interpreting volume drivers through statistical factor analysis rather than mechanical indicator thresholds. It cannot be translated into entry/exit conditions using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators. The signal emphasizes understanding WHY volume occurs (the driver) before trading—this requires domain analysis external to the backtesting engine.
